category_sources: source_facts.description says CLI tool to export Cassandra query as CSV and JSON format; official README says cqlkit exports Cassandra query results to CSV and JSON.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is cqlkit; official repository title is tenmax/cqlkit.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the best official documentation surface and includes examples, installation, and usage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplied as https://github.com/tenmax/cqlkit; per instruction repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description, source_facts.executables, and official README identify Cassandra query export to CSV/JSON via CLI.
